words.def: a meeting at which a number of athletic contests are held
words.zh: v. 相遇( meet的第三人稱單數 ); 相識; 開會; 接觸（某物）

the seat within a bishop's diocese where his cathedral is located
words.zh: vt. 看見, 檢視, 參觀, 遊覽, 理解, 知道, 同意

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
